commit_message: copy(web): honest, punchier landing — drop fabricated metrics + bank hyperbole
also_includes: e33c491 refacto et news letters (newsletter/waitlist feature + Prisma migration 20260613000000_newsletter)
458fdde fix(security): harden prod — WS jti revocation, bind entity media URLs, mask 500s
e270987 feat(legal): RGPD-compliant CGU + privacy + mentions légales

preflight.working_tree: SECURITY_REPORT.md + memory/deployment.json modified locally — excluded by git archive, not deploy-critical

env_changes.all_domain_keys: unchanged — WEB_HOST, API_HOST, CDN_HOST, ADMIN_HOST, CDN_URL, APP_WEB_URL all nigerconnect.app values from previous deploy

migration.detail: All migrations have been successfully applied.

health_checks.containers: all healthy — api, web, postgres, redis, minio
health_checks.newsletter_tables: newsletter_subscribers + newsletter_campaigns — both present in public schema
health_checks.hero_copy: Rejoindre l'aventure — present in web homepage response

tls_acme_status: STILL BLOCKED — third consecutive deploy with same root cause. Cloudflare API token used by Traefik letsencrypt-dns resolver lacks access to the nigerconnect.app zone. All 4 hosts failing: 'failed to find zone nigerconnect.app.: zone could not be found'. No certs have issued for any of the 4 hosts.

dns_status.api.nigerconnect.app: still MISSING A record in Cloudflare
dns_status.cdn.nigerconnect.app: still MISSING A record in Cloudflare

rollback_command: git archive 458fdde | ssh -o BatchMode=yes root@46.224.193.109 'cd /opt/apps/nigerConnect && tar xf - && find . -name "*.sh" -exec sed -i "s/\r$//" {} + && chmod +x scripts/*.sh && ./scripts/deploy-vps.sh'
rollback_note: DB restore required when rolling back past e33c491 — newsletter migration added newsletter_subscribers + newsletter_campaigns tables. Rolling back code without restoring the DB leaves orphaned tables (harmless but inconsistent with the schema at 458fdde).
notes: Full deploy successful. Newsletter live: both DB tables created by migration, POST /api/newsletter/subscribe returns {ok:true}, web homepage shows new hero copy. TLS remains blocked — two manual actions still pending: (1) add A records for api.nigerconnect.app and cdn.nigerconnect.app → 46.224.193.109 in Cloudflare (proxy ON); (2) grant Traefik Cloudflare token Zone:Read + DNS:Edit on the nigerconnect.app zone, then run: ssh root@46.224.193.109 docker restart traefik
